description_long: This doll features a large, rounded head with a black and white color scheme reminiscent of vintage cartoon characters. Its face is marked by exaggerated, stylized eyes and a wide, toothy grin, with sharply defined black markings on the forehead and cheeks. The body is small and slender, dressed in a black suit with a white bow tie and white gloves, giving it a classic, old-fashioned cartoon appearance. The arms and legs are thin and slightly curved, ending in oversized, four-fingered hands and simple, blocky feet. A long, thin, pointed tail extends from the lower back, adding a mischievous touch. The overall design is smooth and simple, with minimal surface detail and a matte finish.
description: A black and white cartoon-style doll with a large head, wide grin, white gloves, and a pointed tail, dressed in a classic suit with a bow tie.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's expressive face, wide grin, large eyes, and white gloves with black spots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the pointed tail, the profile of the head, and the curvature of the arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid black back of the head and body, the tail's attachment, and the back of the gloves and feet.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tail, side profile of the head, and the arm's position.
attribute_clothing_style: Classic cartoon-inspired suit with a white bow tie, black body suit, and white gloves, evoking early 20th-century animation styles.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent and extended outward, legs together, head facing forward, and tail curving outward from the lower back.
attribute_facial_expression: Wide, toothy grin with large, stylized eyes and arched black markings, conveying a mischievous, smiling expression.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and black with stylized, pointed black markings resembling a cartoon cap.
